column22: Camps are for ages 6 – teen. This is a beginner/intermediate aerial camp perfect for those brand new to aerial or with less than a year of aerial experience. In the week long camp your kiddo will learn technique and skills on 4 apparatuses: silks, trapeze, hoop, sling. All our instructors are certified and have experience teaching youth aerialists - our focus is on safety and fun! The 5 day camp is $250. There are half day camp options and full day camp options.

column22: Altitude All Sports is dedicated to developing your child’s basic athletic skills through a series of fun drills and games. Rotating through traditional sports curriculums, participants will have the opportunity to develop various essential sports skills and lay the groundwork for future athletic competition. During the age of technology, now more than ever, it is so important to encourage healthy physical activity. At Altitude All Sports, we promise your children will Learn, Have Fun and Play Hard!
column23: They have different weeks for different ages, so please check carefully.

column21: At artSPARK camps, kids will have time to problem-solve, use critical thinking skills, collaborate, experiment, invent, and be exposed to new artists, materials, and processes. artSPARK offers artistic fun for 2-D and 3-D ideas. Draw, paint, print, collage, sculpt, sew, weave, or tinker around making your ideas happen! We like to break free from giving endless directions to follow, and instead follow our young artists as they think outside the box. Campers will have time to generate their own ideas and make choices through the creative process and sensory play. We let kids discover what lights their "spark" and then fuel the fire. We do cooperative and collaborative activities to encourage kids to broaden their perspective and interact with others. Your child will make something meaningful to them and age appropriate based on their skill level.

School’s Out!: Winter Break
Join us here at the JCC for over two weeks of fun camp magic during winter break! Campers will go on local field trips, swim in our indoor pool, play games in the gym, and complete exciting art projects each day! *Local field trips are for campers in grades 2-6. The finalized schedule of field trips will be announced in the first week of November.

column21: JuneBugs is an all outdoor nature camp for kids! We explore the local ecology of the park through mindfulness, crafts, games, and most importantly, PLAY! Give your child the gift of time spend outside this winter break with JuneBugs!
column22: JuneBugs is a small forest-school-inspired summer camp run out of Washington Park in Denver, Colorado.  This is a half-day program catering to children aged 3-7; where all of our activities will be completely outdoors! We will explore our local ecology, do art projects, team-building exercises, STEAM activities, and story-telling right out of our favorite local urban park.

column21: An intentionally designed, half-day wellness experience for kids 5+. Little Wellness Retreats instills mindfulness through communal and creative exercises that build confidence and connection to self in a comforting and supportive space.
column23:
Ages 5+
We intentionally keep this mixed-age to reflect true community. Younger and older children can learn from each other, build social-emotional skills, and develop confidence as they move through the day. 11-year-olds will step into leadership and 5-year-olds shine with a little support from a new friend.
